mapper.sql: SELECT cc.code_no_cd FROM common_code cc WHERE cc.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' AND NVL(cc.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' AND cc.code_no_cd NOT IN ()
( SELECT mo.apt_cmplex_no FROM mgmt_office mo WHERE mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} )
f.facility_no, f.facility_ty_cd, f.instl_dt, f.facility_nm, f.apt_cmplex_no, f.dong_no, f.loc_cn, f.use_yn, f.file_group_no
f.facility_no, f.facility_ty_cd, TO_CHAR(f.instl_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS instl_dt, f.apt_cmplex_no, f.dong_no, f.loc_cn, f.use_yn, f.file_group_no

CASE WHEN f.facility_ty_cd IN () THEN 'PUBLIC' ELSE 'FACILITY' END AS facility_kind, CASE WHEN f.facility_ty_cd IN () THEN '편의시설' ELSE '일반시설' END AS facility_kind_nm, f.facility_nm AS facility_nm, cc.code_name AS facility_ty_nm, CASE WHEN INSTR(f.dong_no, '_') > 0 THEN SUBSTR(f.dong_no, INSTR(f.dong_no, '_') + 1) ELSE f.dong_no END AS display_dong_no, CASE WHEN f.use_yn = 'Y' THEN '사용 가능' WHEN f.use_yn = 'N' THEN '사용 불가' ELSE '-' END AS use_yn_nm, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict WHERE fch_restrict.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND SYSDATE >= fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt AND SYSDATE < fch_restrict.use_restrict_end_dt ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS current_restrict_yn, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict WHERE fch_restrict.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND SYSDATE >= fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt AND SYSDATE < fch_restrict.use_restrict_end_dt ) THEN 'ONGOING' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict WHERE fch_restrict.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt > SYSDATE ) THEN 'UPCOMING' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict WHERE fch_restrict.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_end_dt <= SYSDATE ) THEN 'ENDED' ELSE 'NONE' END AS current_restrict_status_cd, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict WHERE fch_restrict.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND SYSDATE >= fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt AND SYSDATE < fch_restrict.use_restrict_end_dt ) THEN '제한중' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict WHERE fch_restrict.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt > SYSDATE ) THEN '제한예정' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict WHERE fch_restrict.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_end_dt <= SYSDATE ) THEN '제한종료' ELSE '제한없음' END AS current_restrict_status_nm, CASE WHEN f.use_yn = 'N' THEN '비활성' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict WHERE fch_restrict.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND SYSDATE >= fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt AND SYSDATE < fch_restrict.use_restrict_end_dt ) THEN '이용제한중' ELSE '활성' END AS facility_display_status, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(current_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') FROM ( SELECT fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict WHERE fch_restrict.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND SYSDATE >= fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt AND SYSDATE < fch_restrict.use_restrict_end_dt ORDER BY fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt ) current_restrict WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS current_restrict_bgng_dt, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(current_restrict.use_restrict_end_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') FROM ( SELECT fch_restrict.use_restrict_end_dt FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict WHERE fch_restrict.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND SYSDATE >= fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt AND SYSDATE < fch_restrict.use_restrict_end_dt ORDER BY fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt ) current_restrict WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS current_restrict_end_dt, ( SELECT current_restrict.chk_cn FROM ( SELECT fch_restrict.chk_cn FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict WHERE fch_restrict.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND SYSDATE >= fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt AND SYSDATE < fch_restrict.use_restrict_end_dt ORDER BY fch_restrict.use_restrict_bgng_dt ) current_restrict WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS current_restrict_reason, pf.cmn_facility_no, pf.cmn_facility_nm, pf.cmn_facility_rsv_yn, pf.cmn_facility_opr_hr, CASE WHEN pf.cmn_facility_no IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS public_oper_registered_yn
LEFT OUTER JOIN public_facility pf ON pf.facility_no = f.facility_no LEFT OUTER JOIN common_code cc ON cc.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' AND cc.code_no_cd = f.facility_ty_cd

WHERE f.apt_cmplex_no =
AND f.facility_ty_cd IN ()
AND f.facility_ty_cd NOT IN ()
AND ( LOWER(f.facility_no) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(f.facility_nm) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(pf.cmn_facility_nm) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(f.loc_cn) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND f.facility_ty_cd = #{facilityTyCd}
AND f.instl_dt >= TO_DATE(#{instlStartDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND f.instl_dt < TO_DATE(#{instlEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND f.use_yn = #{useYn}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict_filter WHERE fch_restrict_filter.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND SYSDATE >= fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_bgng_dt AND SYSDATE < fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_end_dt )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict_filter WHERE fch_restrict_filter.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND SYSDATE >= fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_bgng_dt AND SYSDATE < fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_end_dt ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict_filter WHERE fch_restrict_filter.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_bgng_dt > SYSDATE )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict_filter WHERE fch_restrict_filter.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND SYSDATE >= fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_bgng_dt AND SYSDATE < fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_end_dt ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict_filter WHERE fch_restrict_filter.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_bgng_dt > SYSDATE ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict_filter WHERE fch_restrict_filter.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' AND fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_end_dt <= SYSDATE )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM facility_check_hstry fch_restrict_filter WHERE fch_restrict_filter.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch_restrict_filter.use_restrict_yn = 'Y' )
AND (f.dong_no IS NULL OR f.dong_no = '')
AND f.dong_no = #{dongNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT , cc.code_name AS facility_ty_nm, lf.chk_dt AS latest_fault_dt, lf.chk_ty_cd AS latest_fault_ty_cd, CASE WHEN mh.facility_no IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS meter_linked_yn FROM facility f LEFT OUTER JOIN public_facility pf ON pf.facility_no = f.facility_no LEFT OUTER JOIN common_code cc ON cc.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' AND cc.code_no_cd = f.facility_ty_cd LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT fch.facility_no, fch.chk_dt, fch.chk_ty_cd FROM facility_check_hstry fch WHERE fch.chk_stts_cd = 'FAULT' AND fch.chk_dt = ( SELECT MAX(chk_dt) FROM facility_check_hstry WHERE facility_no = fch.facility_no AND chk_stts_cd = 'FAULT' ) ) lf ON lf.facility_no = f.facility_no LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT facility_no FROM meter_hstry ) mh ON mh.facility_no = f.facility_no
ORDER BY /* DEMO ONLY: keep Garak Miryung representative meters off the first facility page. */ CASE WHEN f.facility_no IN ('MTRWTR511', 'MTRGAS511', 'MTRELC511') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, f.facility_no DESC

SELECT ,
FROM facility f
AND pf.cmn_facility_no IS NOT NULL
AND f.facility_ty_cd IN () AND pf.cmn_facility_no IS NULL
ORDER BY /* DEMO ONLY: keep Garak Miryung representative meters off the first facility page. */ CASE WHEN f.facility_no IN ('MTRWTR511', 'MTRGAS511', 'MTRELC511') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, f.facility_no DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM facility f LEFT OUTER JOIN public_facility pf ON pf.facility_no = f.facility_no
AND pf.cmn_facility_no IS NOT NULL
AND f.facility_ty_cd IN () AND pf.cmn_facility_no IS NULL

SELECT DISTINCT f.facility_ty_cd AS code, cc.code_name AS code_nm, CASE WHEN f.facility_ty_cd IN () THEN 'PUBLIC' ELSE 'FACILITY' END AS facility_kind FROM facility f LEFT OUTER JOIN public_facility pf ON pf.facility_no = f.facility_no LEFT OUTER JOIN common_code cc ON cc.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' AND cc.code_no_cd = f.facility_ty_cd WHERE f.apt_cmplex_no =
AND f.facility_ty_cd IN ()
AND f.facility_ty_cd NOT IN ()
ORDER BY facility_kind, code_nm, code

SELECT cc.code_no_cd AS "code", cc.code_name AS "codeNm" FROM common_code cc WHERE cc.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' AND NVL(cc.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' AND cc.code_no_cd NOT IN () ORDER BY cc.code_name, cc.code_no_cd

SELECT ,
FROM facility f
WHERE f.facility_no = #{facilityNo} AND f.apt_cmplex_no =

select * from ( select fch.fac_chk_hstry_no , fch.facility_no , fch.partner_no , fch.chk_flow_no , fch.chk_dt , fch.chk_stts_cd , fch.chk_cn , fch.rmk , fch.reg_dt , fch.mdf_dt , fch.chk_ty_cd , nvl(fch.use_restrict_yn, 'N') as use_restrict_yn , to_char(fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as use_restrict_bgng_dt , to_char(fch.use_restrict_end_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as use_restrict_end_dt
, f.facility_nm , f.facility_ty_cd , f.loc_cn , f.instl_dt , f.use_yn , f.dong_no
, p.partner_nm , p.biz_ty_nm , p.bizrno , p.pic_nm , p.pic_telno , p.pic_email
, chk_ty.code_name as chk_ty_nm , chk_stts.code_name as chk_stts_nm from facility_check_hstry fch inner join facility f on fch.facility_no = f.facility_no left join partner p on fch.partner_no = p.partner_no left join common_code chk_ty on chk_ty.group_code_no = 'CHECK_TY' and chk_ty.code_no_cd = fch.chk_ty_cd left join common_code chk_stts on chk_stts.group_code_no = 'CHECK_STTS' and chk_stts.code_no_cd = fch.chk_stts_cd where fch.facility_no = #{facilityNo} and f.apt_cmplex_no = ( select mo.apt_cmplex_no from mgmt_office mo where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} ) order by fch.chk_dt desc, fch.reg_dt desc ) where rownum <= 3

SELECT
FROM facility f WHERE f.facility_no = #{facilityNo} AND f.apt_cmplex_no =

select fc.cont_no as "contNo" , fct.facility_no as "facilityNo" , fc.partner_no as "partnerNo" , p.partner_nm as "partnerNm" , fc.cont_nm as "contNm" , fc.cont_ty_cd as "contTyCd" , cont_ty.code_name as "contTyNm" , fc.bid_ty_cd as "bidTyCd" , bid_ty.code_name as "bidTyNm" , to_char(fc.cont_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "contDt" , fc.cont_stts_cd as "contSttsCd" , cont_stts.code_name as "contSttsNm" , fc.cont_amt as "contAmt" , to_char(fc.pymt_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "pymtDt" , to_char(fc.cont_bgng_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "contBgngDt" , to_char(fc.cont_end_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "contEndDt" from facility_contract fc inner join facility_contract_target fct on fct.cont_no = fc.cont_no inner join facility f on f.facility_no = fct.facility_no left outer join partner p on p.partner_no = fc.partner_no left outer join common_code cont_ty on cont_ty.group_code_no = 'CONT_TY' and cont_ty.code_no_cd = fc.cont_ty_cd left outer join common_code bid_ty on bid_ty.group_code_no = 'BID_TY' and bid_ty.code_no_cd = fc.bid_ty_cd left outer join common_code cont_stts on cont_stts.group_code_no = 'CONTRACT_STTS' and cont_stts.code_no_cd = fc.cont_stts_cd where fct.facility_no = #{facilityNo} and fc.cont_ty_cd = 'INSTALL' and fc.cont_stts_cd in ('ACTIVE', 'END') and f.apt_cmplex_no = ( select mo.apt_cmplex_no from mgmt_office mo where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} ) order by to_number(regexp_substr(fc.cont_no, '[0-9]+')) desc, fc.cont_no desc fetch first 1 row only
SELECT 'FAC' || LPAD(seq_facility.NEXTVAL, 4, '0') FROM dual
SELECT mo.apt_cmplex_no FROM mgmt_office mo WHERE mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO facility ( facility_no, facility_ty_cd, instl_dt, facility_nm, apt_cmplex_no, dong_no, loc_cn, use_yn, file_group_no ) VALUES ( #{facilityNo}, #{facilityTyCd}, #{instlDt}, #{facilityNm}, #{aptCmplexNo}, #{dongNo}, #{locCn}, NVL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), #{fileGroupNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT 'CUS' || LPAD( NVL( MAX( TO_NUMBER( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(code_no_cd, '^CUS[0-9]{3}$') THEN SUBSTR(code_no_cd, 4) END ) ), 0 ) + 1, 3, '0' ) FROM common_code WHERE group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM common_code WHERE group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' AND NVL(use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' AND TRIM(code_name) = TRIM(#{codeName})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_code ( group_code_no, code_no_cd, code_name, code_content, sort_order, use_yn ) VALUES ( 'FACILITY_TY', #{codeNoCd}, #{codeName}, #{codeContent}, ( SELECT NVL(MAX(sort_order), 0) + 1 FROM common_code WHERE group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' ), 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.facility_no) AS disabled_total, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TRUNC(fch.mdf_dt) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN fch.facility_no END) AS disabled_today FROM facility f LEFT OUTER JOIN facility_check_hstry fch ON fch.facility_no = f.facility_no AND fch.chk_stts_cd = 'FAULT' WHERE f.use_yn = 'N' AND f.apt_cmplex_no =
SELECT DISTINCT dong_no, dong_nm FROM apt_unit WHERE apt_cmplex_no = AND dong_no IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dong_no
SELECT dong_no, dong_nm FROM apt_unit WHERE apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} ORDER BY dong_nm
SELECT DISTINCT floor FROM apt_detail WHERE dong_no = #{dongNo} ORDER BY floor
SELECT ho_no, ho FROM apt_detail WHERE dong_no = #{dongNo} AND floor = #{floor} ORDER BY ho
SELECT * FROM attach_file WHERE file_group_no = #{fileGroupNo} AND file_save_uuid = #{fileSaveUuid}
SELECT * FROM attach_file WHERE file_group_no = #{fileGroupNo} ORDER BY file_sort_order, reg_dt
